personality: Devout, road-worn, quietly hopeful. Speaks with gentle reverence about sacred places and the journey itself.

greetingPool.text: Blessings upon you, fellow traveller. I walk this road in search of the holy spring — they say its waters carry the grace of saints long departed.
The road to the shrine is long, but each step is a prayer. Will you walk a while with me?
I have left hearth and home to seek what cannot be found within four walls. The sacred places call to those who listen.
A kind face on a pilgrim road is worth more than silver. God keep you, friend.

idlePool.text: My feet ache but my spirit is light. The shrine cannot be more than a day's walk now.
I have carried this prayer from my village. When I reach the holy place, I will lay it down at last.
